inputs.prompt: Your org: Threadline Media — podcast production company, 120K monthly listeners across 3 shows. Partner: City Journal Online — digital-first news outlet covering municipal governance, 800K monthly visitors. Concept: Co-produced 6-episode investigative podcast about how cities spend federal infrastructure money. Each side brings: Threadline has audio production expertise and podcast audience; City Journal has investigative reporters and municipal data access. Existing relationship: None formal, shared one freelancer. Problem solved: Threadline lacks investigative capacity; City Journal wants to launch audio but has no production infrastructure.

Your org: Small YouTube channel about architecture (50K subscribers). Partner: An architecture magazine. Concept: Joint video series about controversial buildings. What you bring: Video production. What they bring: Expert writers and publication reach.

Your org: Klangwerk Studios (Vienna) — audio production company specializing in cultural documentaries. Partner: Polskie Radio — Polish national public broadcaster with strong documentary tradition. Concept: A co-produced 4-part radio documentary series tracing the musical connections between Vienna and Warsaw from the 18th century to the present. Each side brings: Klangwerk has archive relationships with Austrian music institutions; Polskie Radio has access to Polish national archives and broadcast distribution across Central Europe. Existing relationship: Met at Prix Italia 2025. Problem solved: Neither side can tell a bilateral cultural story alone.
